Prior ProvisionsProvisions similar to were contained in the following prior appropriation acts:section 71 of this title, .Jan. 24, 1923, ch. 4242 Stat. 1179, .June 30, 1922, ch. 255, § 142 Stat. 766, .May 24, 1922, ch. 19942 Stat. 557, .Mar. 24, 1921, ch. 16141 Stat. 1397, .June 5, 1920, ch. 23541 Stat. 907, .July 19, 1919, ch. 2441 Stat. 194, , abolished land office at Springfield and offices of register and receiver thereat.Act May 24, 1922, ch. 19942 Stat. 557, §§ 1, 2, , 372, abolished office of receiver of public moneys at Springfield, Mo., transferred his duties and custody of books, records, etc., to register, and contained other provisions concerning register’s duties.Act May 2, 1914, ch. 7438 Stat. 371Act. , , required duplication of reports and returns of registers and receivers to be prevented by regulations.Mar. 2, 1895, ch. 177, § 328 Stat. 807Act. , , concerned taking of final proofs by remaining officer in case of a vacancy in office of register or receiver.Oct. 1, 1890, ch. 1269, § 226 Stat. 657
